name: closed loop step comparator-grounding verifies the comparator subagent declines without grounding
command: printf '{"question":"q","grounded_sources":[]}\n' > query.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --step comparator-grounding --query query.json --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'comparator_declined=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
